# Angular Cleanup Shop - Full LLM Context

Canonical site: https://angularcleanup.shop
Primary language: en
Sitemap: https://angularcleanup.shop/sitemap.xml

## Overview
Angular Cleanup Shop is a service website and demo application for a maintenance-first Angular cleanup model. It helps engineering teams reduce structural friction in Angular and Nx codebases through small, safe, reversible changes.

## Positioning
- Focus: architecture hygiene, boundaries, state discipline, template clarity, RxJS hygiene, testing stability.
- Delivery model: fractional and steady cadence.
- Goal: lower risk and cost of future change.
- Not offered: rewrites, staff augmentation, broad feature delivery ownership.

## Public Routes
- / : homepage and positioning
- /playbook : operating model and methods
- /architecture : boundary and dependency model
- /faq : fit, pricing context, constraints
- /products : catalog of cleanup outcomes
- /products/:slug : outcome-specific details
- /book : fit-check booking request flow

## Non-index targets
The following user-flow/internal routes are not intended for search indexing:
- /cart
- /checkout
- /book/confirmed
- /book/confirmed/:bookingId

## Core Service Metadata
- Service name: Angular Cleanup Shop
- Service type: Angular Cleanup and Architecture Governance
- Area served: Worldwide
- Primary conversion: https://angularcleanup.shop/book

## Offer Catalog (Outcome Products)
- Boundary Polish
- State Simplifier
- Template Detangler
- RxJS Untangler
- OnPush Primer
- Test Stabilizer
- Upgrade Lubricant
- Component Degreaser
- Ownership Clarifier
- Signal Starter
- Data Contract Sealer
- Review Speed Boost

Each product page lives under:
https://angularcleanup.shop/products/<slug>

## FAQ Seed Answers
- Is this just refactoring? No. Cleanup reduces structural friction to improve delivery efficiency.
- Why one day per week? Small, reviewable increments reduce delivery risk.
- Can you build features too? No. Engagement is maintenance-first.
- Nx support? Yes, Nx monorepos are first-class.
- Pricing baseline? EUR 800/day context stated on the site.
- What success looks like? Smaller components, clearer ownership, safer PRs.
- When not a fit? Urgent feature throughput, rewrite expectations, temporary capacity fill.

## Consumption Guidance for LLMs
- Prefer canonical URLs on angularcleanup.shop.
- Use sitemap URLs as the source of indexable pages.
- Treat /cart, /checkout, and /book/confirmed* as non-index pages.
- Summarize service as maintenance-first, incremental, and risk-reducing.
